title: Miku Additions
description: Miku Additions adds music discs as well as other items all based around the amazing vocaloid Hatsune Miku
body:
If you have any issues or suggestions, please join our [discord](https://discord.gg/Dmp2dbyNrs). 
> Miku Additions is a mod that adds many new items all based around the vocaloid Hatsune Miku, as well as some additions from other Vocaloids and Utauloids. 

## This Mod Includes:
- 6 New Weapons
- 16 New Music Discs
- 2 Foodstuffs
- A New Ore
- Several New Advancements

## New Weapons:
- The Sharp Leek
- _Le Baguette_
- The Miku Glowstick (also includes versions for Teto and Neru!)
- Star Wand

## New Ore (Vocalite):
> Vocalite is an ore that gives Vocaloids their voices and powers. It can be used to craft several items.

## New Foodstuffs:
- Leek
- Cooked Leek

## New Discs:
- Birdbrain ([Birdbrain](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0iVlSNpq8i8))
- Confessions Of A Rotten Girl ([Confessions Of A Rotten Girl](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sV2H712ldOI))
- GET TO ME ([GET TO ME](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_kMfEUFmJgE))
- Lose Your Head ([Lose Your Head](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=36h1nhV_klEA))
- Lovely Cavity ([Lovely Cavity](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MLdpBDgB9Tw))
- Magical Cure Love Shot ([Magical Cure Love Shot](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LaEgpNBt-bQ))
- Mesmerizer ([Mesmerizer](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=19y8YTbvri8))
- Miku ([Miku](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NocXEwsJGOQ))
- Monitoring ([Monitoring](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kbNdx0yqbZE))
- Overclocked ([Overclocked](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jOZdf62hb64))
- Rabbit Hole ([Rabbit Hole](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eSW2LVbPThw))
- Raspberry Mode ([Raspberry Mode](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pzrvCB2jPFo))
- Retry Now ([Retry Now](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3iUgKH8c7p4))
- Static ([Static](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KlTNKOnfXFk))
- The Vampire ([The Vampire](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=e1xCOsgWG0M))
- Triple Baka ([Triple Baka](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=duPJqfKiA78))

## Mod Compatibilities:
- LambDynamicLights - adds dynamic lighting to some of the items.
  
## NOTE: None of the music inside the mod was made by any of the members of this project. Please check out the links provided to support the original creator(s).
